name: New Mexico Red Bean Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Each Cumin and Coriander, ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the beef into a 5-6 quart pan over high heat. Cook, stirring until the beef is well browned.
2. Remove the meat and set aside. Discard all but 2 tablespoons of the drippings.
3. Add the onion and cook, stirring often, until the onion is soft.
4. Puree the pimentos and their liquid in a blender.
5. Return the beef to the pan with the pimento puree, broth, tomatoes (broken up with a spoon), and all spices, cumin, coriander, oregano, ground chile, and beans.
6. Bring to a boil; then reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes.
7. Uncover and continue to simmer until thickened to your liking; stir often.
8. Note: Substitute roasted red peppers in place of pimentos if desired. Proceed as directed.
